# discord_member_nickname (Resource)

Manages the nickname of a guild member. Applying sets the member's nickname; destroying clears it back to the user's default name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_member_nickname" "alice" {
  server_id = "123456789012345678"
  user_id   = "345678901234567890"
  nick      = "Alice (Mod)"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `nick` (String) Nickname to set for the member.
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.
- `user_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the member's user.
